evidence: In #41146 a input parameter `explicitTz` was introduced to function `types.ParseTime` to avoid data race. Now after some refactoring works after `47355`, we use `types.Context` which is immutable to replace `stmtctx.StatementContext`. So it is still thread-safe after we remove `explicitTz`.
